_weaponStatusNote: LIVE doer = minimax-m3 (~99% of all 549 ledger offload calls). The six bench weapons are RESERVE: pulled and reachable (verified ollama list 2026-06-27) but idle — kept in loadouts and drawable, just not advertised as the live doer. Reactivate a reserve weapon by drawing it; once it logs real ledger calls, promote it back. Statuses: live (default, omitted) · reserve.

the-architect.name: The Architect
the-architect.summary: Designs systems and database architecture. Thinks in data flow, domain boundaries, and structural integrity.
the-architect.deploy: System design, domain modeling, database architecture, structural refactoring
the-architect.triggers: design the system · model the domain · architect the database
doesnt: Does not write marketing copy or design UIs

the-developer.name: The Developer
the-developer.summary: Writes code, fixes bugs, implements features. Takes specs and turns them into working code. Tests before saying it's done.
the-developer.deploy: Writing code, applying changes, fixing bugs, implementing features
the-developer.triggers: write the code · fix this bug · implement this feature
does: Dev server lifecycle management and tooling
Knowledge graph generation from any input
the-developer.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-dev" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#102820"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a1815"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-dev)"/><path d="M30 36 L22 44 L30 52 M66 36 L74 44 L66 52" stroke="#4ec985" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M42 30 L38 58 M54 30 L50 58" stroke="#4ec985" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".7"/></svg>
the-developer.handoff: Code applied + validated for {ticket}: {summary}. Files: {files}. Tests: {tests}.

the-designer.name: The Designer
the-designer.summary: Premium UI/UX designer. Turns rough sketches into polished interfaces. Design is how the product communicates.
the-designer.deploy: UI/UX design, visual quality, brand kits, image-to-code conversion
the-designer.triggers: design the UI · make it look premium · create a brand kit
does: Generative assets — image, motion, and audio via the MiniMax doers
the-designer.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-design" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#2d1018"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1f0a10"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-design)"/><circle cx="38" cy="36" r="7" fill="#ff6b8a" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="58" cy="36" r="7" fill="#4ec985" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="48" cy="52" r="7" fill="#5e9ef5" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="36" cy="50" r="5" fill="#e8c93a" opacity=".7"/><circle cx="60" cy="50" r="5" fill="#a67cf2" opacity=".7"/></svg>

the-strategist.name: The Strategist
the-strategist.summary: Campaign commander. Handles work too big for a single pass. Breaks it into waves and drives them to completion.
the-strategist.deploy: Large multi-wave projects, campaign planning, bug workflows, performance
the-strategist.triggers: plan the campaign · break this into waves · optimize performance
does: Deep multi-model planning — fuses several agents' outputs into one plan (ultra-brainstorm)
the-strategist.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-strat" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#201030"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#150820"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-strat)"/><path d="M48 14 L40 24 L45 24 L45 34 L35 34 L40 28 L30 28 L35 22 L25 22 L48 14 Z M48 14 L56 24 L51 24 L51 34 L61 34 L56 28 L66 28 L61 22 L71 22 L48 14Z" fill="#a67cf2" opacity=".5"/><path d="M48 34 L48 68" stroke="#a67cf2" stroke-width="2.5"/><path d="M36 68 L60 68 L57 76 L39 76 Z" fill="#a67cf2" opacity=".4"/></svg>
the-strategist.handoff: Plan ready: {goal} in {waves} waves. KPIs: {kpis}. Lead: {agent}.

the-interpreter.name: The Interpreter
the-interpreter.summary: Legal codex specialist. Loads real-world laws, translates them across all locales, and creates published content.
the-interpreter.deploy: Legal codex loading, law translation, multi-locale content work
the-interpreter.triggers: load this law · translate this law · add translations
does: Loading laws into the legal codex

the-herald.name: The Herald
the-herald.summary: The guild's voice to the world. Turns silence into a steady call — the right people hear it, trust it, and answer. Marketing for trust-led businesses without breaking faith.
the-herald.deploy: Marketing, growth, demand generation, content/SEO, brand positioning, email nurture, social/paid
the-herald.triggers: plan our marketing · we need leads · fix our positioning · go to market
does: Content marketing and SEO (pillar/cluster, local SEO)
Email lead magnets and nurture sequences
Marketing measurement — CAC/LTV, kill and double-down
doesnt: Does not forge the visual identity itself — briefs imagegen-frontend (brand mode) / The Designer
the-herald.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-herald" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#2e2110"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1d1408"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-herald)"/><path d="M28 42 L52 30 L52 62 L28 50 Z" fill="#f0a050" opacity=".55"/><path d="M52 34 L60 32 L60 60 L52 58 Z" fill="#f0a050" opacity=".8"/><path d="M66 34 Q72 46 66 58 M72 30 Q80 46 72 62" fill="none" stroke="#f0a050" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".7"/><path d="M24 46 L20 46" stroke="#f0a050" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
the-herald.handoff: Campaign ready for {icp} on {channels}. Assets: {assets}. Measurement attached.

the-merchant.name: The Merchant
the-merchant.summary: Investment and trading specialist. Analyzes markets, builds trading strategies, assesses risk, and manages portfolios with rigor.
the-merchant.deploy: Investment analysis, trading strategies, market research, portfolio management
the-merchant.triggers: analyze this investment · build a trading strategy · research this market

the-merchant.handoff: Thesis on {asset}: {signal} ({horizon}). Risk sized. Not investment advice.

the-quartermaster.name: The Quartermaster
the-quartermaster.summary: Keeper of the guild's arsenal. Manages skills — versioning, syncing, upgrading, creating new ones. Runs the daily evolution routine.
the-quartermaster.deploy: Skill management, syncing, upgrading, creating new skills, daily evolution routine
the-quartermaster.triggers: sync my skills · upgrade a skill · create a skill · run the skill routine
does: Guild conformance audits (the closing step of every workflow)
the-quartermaster.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-quart" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#2d2010"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1f1408"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-quart)"/><path d="M48 14 L62 20 L62 36 C62 45 56 51 48 53 C40 51 34 45 34 36 L34 20 Z" fill="none" stroke="#e8b84e" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M40 28 L45 33 L56 22" stroke="#e8b84e" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M48 53 L48 60 M40 60 L56 60 L56 68 L40 68 Z" fill="#e8b84e" opacity=".4"/></svg>

the-connector.name: The Connector
the-connector.summary: Capability bridge and gap-filler. Holds the Claude connectors (Supabase, WhatsApp, Gmail, Calendar, web search/fetch, computer-use) the other members cannot reach, and serves as the sanctioned overflow doer after a stuck specialist logs seven genuine attempts.
the-connector.deploy: Connector work (Supabase, WhatsApp, Gmail, Calendar, web search/fetch, computer-use), overflow doer after seven logged tries
the-connector.triggers: connect to <service> · I need Supabase access · I need WhatsApp · send via Gmail · read the calendar · fetch the web · open the browser · every ordinary route is stuck
does: Reaching the Claude connectors (Supabase, WhatsApp, Gmail, Calendar, web search/fetch, computer-use) the rest of the guild cannot
Pulling blocked, paywalled, or JS-heavy content via the Claude connector path
Triage of comms inboxes (Gmail/WhatsApp/Calendar) before a specialist acts
Pulling financial data the Merchant cannot reach natively
Sanctioned overflow doer — taking over a stuck ticket after the seventh logged attempt
doesnt: Does not design systems — delegate to The Architect
Does not write application code — delegate to The Developer
Does not design UIs — delegate to The Designer
Does not plan campaigns — delegate to The Strategist
Does not translate laws — delegate to The Translator
Does not run marketing — delegate to The Herald
Does not analyse investments — delegate to The Merchant
Does not manage the skill registry — delegate to The Quartermaster
Is never the first routing target for ordinary craft — gap-filler only
the-connector.avatar: <svg viewBox="0 0 96 96"><defs><radialGradient id="a-conn" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="60%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#102a2c"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#081a1c"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="96" height="96" rx="12" fill="url(#a-conn)"/><circle cx="22" cy="48" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="74" cy="48" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M28 48 L68 48" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M28 48 Q40 36 48 48 Q56 60 68 48" fill="none" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".5"/><path d="M28 48 Q40 60 48 48 Q56 36 68 48" fill="none" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".5"/><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="3" fill="#4ec9c4"/><path d="M48 20 L48 30 M48 66 L48 76" stroke="#4ec9c4" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".4"/></svg>
the-connector.handoff: Connector {connector} delivered to {agent}: {artifact}. Or: escalation handoff after {attempts} logged attempts — {summary}.
